label: General — no sector-specific framing

label: K — Financial and insurance activities

label: N — Administrative and support service activities

label: O — Public administration and defence; compulsory social security

framework: UN ISIC Rev.4 Section O; note Chapter 2 GDPR exclusions for purely public tasks in some Member States — still cite sources only.

label: Q — Human health and social work activities
searchTerms: healthcare hospital clinic medical patient health data social care nursing GDPR health
framework: UN ISIC Rev.4 Section Q; often overlaps with special-category data in GDPR.
